title: Vinyl Album Cover Art
summary: Bold 12-inch album cover - retro futurist sun and palm trees, big serif typography.
prompt: A bold 12-inch vinyl record album cover design: stylized retro-futurist landscape with a setting sun behind silhouetted palm trees, gradient sky from hot pink at top to deep purple at horizon, geometric mountain ranges, scan-line texture overlay. Large all-caps serif title text "NIGHT DRIVE" centered in glowing gradient, subtitle in monospace below. 1980s VHS / synthwave / Vaporwave album-art aesthetic. Square 1:1, print-ready.
